_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of best practices from industry and academia in test design activities for verification and validation of systems.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of compliance assessment methodologies, including control testing, evidence gathering, gap analysis, and findings documentation standards.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.528), DQ-K-018 (DQ, cosine: 0.528).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.620). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [academia, activities, best, design, industry, practices] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, assessment, compliance, control, documentation, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.884, R=0.870). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (82.2%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of best practices from industry and academia in test design activities" and "Knowledge of compliance assessment methodologies, including control testing, evi". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.576 ≈ STS 0.620 (gap 0.044). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [academia, activities, best, design, industry, practices]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, assessment, compliance, control, documentation, evidence].
